turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi. I need to reschedule my DEXA scan. Got the date mixed up in my calendar.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: No problem! Name and current appointment details?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Alka Maheshwari. It was this Monday at 8:30 AM — radiology department.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Got it. Next available DEXA slot is Wednesday at 9 AM or next Monday at 8:30 AM. Which suits you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Rescheduled! Alka Maheshwari, Wednesday at 9:00 AM for DEXA scan. Updated confirmation will be sent. Anything else?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: That's all. Sorry for the confusion.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Absolutely no need to apologise! See you Wednesday.
